title: 4 Stocks to Watch as Bitcoin Briefly Breaches the $35,000 Mark
text: Block (SQ), BlackRock (BLK), Interactive Brokers (IBKR) and Cboe Global (CBOE) are four crypto-exposed stocks that must be tracked as Bitcoin momentarily crosses the $35,000 mark.

title: 5 Crypto-Focused Stocks to Buy Despite Wall Street Turmoil
text: Five crypto-related stocks to watch are: NVDA, CME, COIN, SQ, IBKR.

title: 1 Super Stock Can Help You Weather the Latest Stock Market Sell-Off
text: The benchmark S&P 500 stock market index is down 7.6% since the beginning of August. Rising interest rates weigh on the market as investors see more attractive risk-free investment alternatives.

title: Interactive Brokers: Strong Buy, As Margin Lending Boosts Earnings
text: Interactive Brokers dominates the electronic trading and brokerage services market with close to 2.1 million customer accounts and $120.6 billion in assets. The company's margin financing business is set to capture significant profits from lending, with a projected net interest income run-rate of $3-4 billion in 2024. Using a residual earnings model, the estimated fair implied share price for Interactive Brokers is $98.08, suggesting approximately 20% upside for the stock.

title: After Plunging -8.83% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why the Trend Might Reverse for Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (IBKR)
text: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (IBKR) is technically in oversold territory now, so the heavy selling pressure might have exhausted. This along with strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in raising earnings estimates could lead to a trend reversal for the stock.

title: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Beats on Q3 Earnings, Stock Slips
text: Robust revenue growth supports Interactive Brokers' (IBKR) Q3 earnings.

title: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (IBKR) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:IBKR ) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript October 17, 2023 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Nancy Stuebe - Director, IR Paul Brody - CFO Thomas Peterffy - Chairman Milan Galik - CEO Conference Call Participants Craig Siegenthaler - Bank of America Benjamin Budish - Barclays Patrick Moley - Piper Sandler Brennan Hawken - UBS Daniel Fannon - Jefferies Chris Allen - Citi James Yaro - Goldman Sachs Kyle Voigt - KBW Operator Good day, and thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Interactive Brokers Group Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (IBKR) Q3 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (IBKR) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (IBKR) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (IBKR) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.55 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.48 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.08 per share a year ago.

title: Interactive Brokers 3Q financial results beat estimates as customer accounts climb
text: Interactive Brokers Group after Tuesday's close reported third-quarter adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of $1.55, up from $1.08 a year earlier and better than the $1.51 analyst consensus forecast.  The company, which through its affiliates provides automated trade execution and custody of securities, commodities and foreign exchange on over 150 markets, generated revenue for the period of $1.14 billion, an improvement from $847 million a year ago while also edging past expectations of $1.11 billion.

title: Interactive Brokers Group Announces 3Q2023 Results
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $IBKR #Earnings--Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: IBKR), an automated global electronic broker, announced results for the quarter ended September 30, 2023. Reported diluted earnings per share were $1.56 for the current quarter and $1.55 as adjusted. For the year-ago quarter, reported diluted earnings per share were $0.97 and $1.08 as adjusted. Reported net revenues were $1,145 million for the current quarter and $1,139 million as adjusted. For the year-ago quarter, rep.

title: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Records Decline in September DARTs
text: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) witnesses a decline in Daily Average Revenue Trades (DARTs) for September.

title: Interactive Brokers Group Reports Brokerage Metrics and Other Financial Information for September 2023, includes Reg.-NMS Execution Statistics
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $IBKR #IBKR--Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: IBKR) an automated global electronic broker, today reported its Electronic Brokerage monthly performance metrics for September. Brokerage highlights for the month included: 1.798 million Daily Average Revenue Trades (DARTs)1, 8% lower than prior year and 7% lower than prior month. Ending client equity of $369.8 billion, 29% higher than prior year and 2% lower than prior month. Ending client margin loan balances of $43.6.
